title: Subscription Billing and Revenue Management System

prd.oneLiner: Connect customer subscriptions, plans, invoices, payments, recovery work, and revenue analysis.
prd.goal: Improve recovery of failed-payment subscriptions and monthly revenue visibility.
prd.whyNow: Plans, subscription changes, invoices, and payment failures are separated, causing revenue leakage and slow customer response.
prd.problem: Plans, subscription changes, invoices, and payment failures are separated, causing revenue leakage and slow customer response.
prd.solution: Connect customer subscriptions, plans, invoices, payments, recovery work, and revenue analysis.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Operator managing subscriptions and billing
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Plans, subscription changes, invoices, and payment failures are separated, causing revenue leakage and slow customer response.

targets.name: Revenue operations and finance coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Plans, subscription changes, invoices, and payment failures are separated, causing revenue leakage and slow customer response.

scenarios.text: Operator managing subscriptions and billing completes customer subscription, plan, and billing-detail registration and checks progress.
Revenue operations and finance coordinator reviews mrr, churn, recovery, and payment-failure reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Improve recovery of failed-payment subscriptions and monthly revenue visibility.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Customer subscription, plan, and billing-detail registration
Customer, subscription, invoice, payment, and delinquency-status lookup
Plan change, invoice generation, payment failure, and renewal handling
MRR, churn, recovery, and payment-failure reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
